about.name: Your Name
about.bio1: I write about software engineering, product design, and whatever else occupies my mind. Currently building things at
about.bio2: Previously worked on distributed systems, developer tooling, and the occasional side project that never ships.
about.authorDescription: I have been working in IT for more than 8 years. I started my career as data analyst: in the first company it was based on Excel and VBA, in the second: Excel, Python and MySQL. Then I started scraping data and found my first job as a python dev. The phrase that always motivates me: If you can read — you can learn.
